title: HardcoreAxol's Mithril Mod
description: this mod add mithril to minecraft
body:
# **HardcoreAxol's Mithril Mod**  

🔹 _A refined, endgame upgrade beyond Netherite — balanced for vanilla progression._ 🔹   Mithril is a rare, high-tier metal found in the End.  
It offers unmatched strength, durability, and magical potential, making it more powerful and enchantable than any other ore.

***

## **Features**

### ⚒ Tools & Weapons  

*   Mithril Sword
*   Mithril Axe
*   Mithril Pickaxe
*   Mithril Shovel
*   Mithril Hoe  
    _All tools are faster and more durable than Netherite._

### 🛡 Armor

*   Full Mithril Armor Set  
    _Provides higher protection and durability than Netherite._

### 🧱 Blocks  

*   Mithril Block
*   Block of Raw Mithril

### 🔹 Items  

*   Raw Mithril _(mined from Mithril Ore)_
*   Mithril Ingot _(crafted from Raw Mithril)_

### 🍔 Food

*   Mithril Carrot _(stronger than Golden Carrot)_
*   Mithril Apple _(stronger than Golden Apple, shorter duration)_
*   Enchanted Mithril Apple _(highest power, lasts 30 seconds)_

***

## **World Generation**  

*   Mithril Ore spawns **exclusively in the End** as a rare resource.
*   Requires a **Diamond or Netherite pickaxe** to harvest.
*   Reccomanded Mining method is TNT in Y level 38

***

## **Planned Features**  

*   Mithril Golem _(stronger and tougher than Iron Golems, slower movement)_
*   Mithril Horse Armor _(stronger and tougher than Diamond Armor)_

***

## 💬 **Feedback & Suggestions**  

Found a bug or have a suggestion? Let us know!

***

## 🔓 **This Project is Open Source**  

Check out the GitHub repository: **[HardcoreAxol's Mithril Mod – GitHub](https://github.com/HardcoreAxolotl/HardcoreAxols-Mithril-Mod)**
